interactives.title: Try It: Source Snippet
interactives.description: Editable static Python snippet. Browser execution is intentionally disabled for extracted Python; copy and run locally if needed.
interactives.code:
def compute_jaccard(A, B):
        intersection = len(A & B)  # @inspect intersection
        union = len(A | B)  # @inspect union
        return intersection / union
